1.title: Your kit ships in 2 business days
1.desc: We pack and send your kit as soon as we receive your order.

2.title: You receive it, you test it
2.desc: Feel the fabric, have your team try it on, take photos under your real lighting.

3.title: You order or request a quote
3.desc: Browse our catalogue or request a full quote. The kit cost is credited on your first order.

1.q: How much does the kit cost?
1.a: Between $49.95 and $79.95 depending on the kit type. The cost covers the garments, sample embroidery and round-trip shipping.

2.q: Is the cost refunded on my first order?
2.a: Yes. The full amount paid for the kit is automatically credited on your first team order (minimum 12 pieces).

3.a: You can keep the garments or return them with the prepaid label. No purchase obligation.

4.q: What's the delivery time for the kit?
4.a: Your kit ships from our workshop within 2 business days. Free delivery anywhere in Canada in 3 to 5 days.

handoff.title: Not the right match?
handoff.body: If none of the kits matches your needs, request a direct quote and we'll build a custom kit for your team.

success.heading: Your kit is on its way
success.subhead: You'll receive a confirmation email within minutes. Your kit ships in 2 business days.

nextSteps.heading: What's coming up
nextSteps.1: We pack your kit in our Saint-Hubert workshop.
nextSteps.2: You receive an email with the tracking number once it ships.
nextSteps.3: You test the garments with your team.
nextSteps.4: You order or request a full quote — the kit cost is credited.

support.heading: Question about your kit?
support.body: Our team is available Monday to Friday, 8 a.m. to 5 p.m.

footer.tagline: Company apparel and signage. Made and embroidered in Quebec for over 20 years.

hero.headline: Company apparel that looks professional from day one.
hero.subhead: Embroidered and printed polos, tees, and hoodies for Quebec SMBs. Full-service, fast turnaround, durable quality.

industry.indexSubhead: Pick your sector. We take you straight to the uniforms and accessories Québec teams in your industry actually wear.
industry.indexFallbackBody: We outfit dozens of sectors. Request a quote and we'll build the right kit for your team.
industry.recommendedSubhead: The pieces customers in your industry recommend most.
industry.viewOthersBody: Every sector has its constraints. Find yours.
industry.metaDescriptionSuffix: Five business days after logo approval. French-speaking service across Québec.

1.q: What is the delivery lead time?
1.a: Five business days after logo approval. Rush orders are possible — talk to us.

2.q: Which fabrics work best for this sector?
2.a: We pick the fabric with you based on your team's constraints: cold, sweat, industrial laundering, abrasion.

3.a: Yes. Main logo, back logo, employee name, department number: we handle multiple decoration zones on the same order.

4.q: How long does the decoration last?
4.a: Our embroidery holds for five years under commercial wash cycles. Screen printing on quality fabric lasts two to three years depending on use.

plp.heading: All uniforms
plp.subhead: Polos, tees, hoodies, jackets, caps. Filter by category, specialty, or color. All prices are in CAD before taxes.

featured.heading: The uniforms Québec teams wear
featured.subhead: Field-tested fabrics, embroidery that survives industrial laundering, delivery in five business days after logo approval.

1.title: Choose your apparel
1.desc: Browse the catalog or order a discovery kit to touch three samples first.

2.title: We approve your logo
2.desc: We digitize and send a proof. You approve before we touch any apparel.

3.title: Receive in 5 business days
3.desc: Guaranteed five-day production after approval. Delivery anywhere in Québec.

1.q: What is your production lead time?
1.a: Five business days after logo approval. For rush orders, talk to us — we can often accelerate.

2.a: Twelve units for embroidery, twenty-four for screen printing. For smaller quantities, we'll work something out.

3.q: How do I submit my logo?
3.a: Upload a PDF, AI, SVG, PNG, or JPG. We check the quality and show you a proof to approve before we touch any apparel.

4.a: Québec and Ontario by default, with carriers we know well. Other provinces available on request.

5.q: What is the difference between embroidery and screen printing?
5.a: Embroidery suits simple logos on polos, caps, and beanies: durable, raised texture. Screen printing works on all apparel and supports more colors.

6.q: Can I reorder the same order?
6.a: Yes. Your logo, sizes, and colors are kept on file. Reordering the same thing takes thirty seconds.

1.q: How long before I get my order?
1.a: Five business days after logo approval for most items. Embroidered jackets can take up to ten days.

2.q: Can I see the logo proof before production?
2.a: Yes. You receive a digital proof and approve it before we touch any apparel.

3.q: What if I need less than the minimum quantity?
3.a: Talk to us. We can often work it out with a setup adjustment for smaller runs.

4.a: Yes. Direct delivery in Greater Montreal, elsewhere in Québec and Ontario by trusted carrier. Other provinces on request.

upload.dropzoneTitle: Drag your logo here or click to choose
upload.dropzoneSubtitle: Accepted formats: PDF, AI, SVG, PNG, JPG. Max 25 MB.

error.tooLarge: File exceeds 25 MB. Compress it or contact us.
error.wrongFormat: Unsupported format. Use PDF, AI, SVG, PNG or JPG.
error.generic: Couldn't read the file. Try again or contact us.

pass.label: Vector
pass.recommendation: Vector format — sharp at any size.

warn.label: {dpi} DPI
warn.recommendation: Resolution is acceptable. We may ask for a sharper version for large prints.

fail.label: {dpi} DPI
fail.recommendation: Low resolution. We'll reach out for a higher-quality file.

pass.label: {count} colors
pass.recommendation: Ideal for embroidery or screen printing.

warn.label: {count} colors
warn.recommendation: More than 8 colors — we recommend screen print or DTG over embroidery.

centerChest.label: Center chest
centerChest.description: For wider logos or bolder identity.

contrast.warning: Low contrast — here's how it will look.
contrast.ok: Good contrast with the selected garment color.

notes.label: Notes for our team (optional)
notes.placeholder: Specify any requirement: Pantone colors, exact position, material constraints.

cta.continue: We check everything, then you get a proof before production.
cta.success: Logo saved. Our team will verify everything before production.
